purpose: Scored gate the guardian applies before a product-analytics deliverable ships.

criteria.check: Exactly one playbook was read and topic matches the enum verbatim.
Every non-obvious / numeric claim carries [DOC] [CONFIG] [CODIGO] [INFERENCIA] or [SUPUESTO]; each [SUPUESTO] paired with a verification step.
Baselines, traffic, conversion rates, and benchmarks are sourced or marked 'not verified'.
No significance/lift/causality before sample size + method satisfied; 'green = win' rejected; SRM check planned.
One unit; denominator policy stated; strict-ordered counts non-increasing; causal 'why' cited or labeled hypothesis.
Denominators fixed at cohort t0; immature late-period cells excluded; 'active' defined identically across cohorts.
Every event has owner, single-fire trigger, typed properties, identity policy, privacy class, and evidence tag.
Each KPI is owned, defined, instrumented, and tied to a decision; every lagging KPI has a leading driver.
Each parameter has name, type, scope, unit, cardinality bound, PII class; client-vs-server stated.
Latency budget + freshness SLO met at peak; transport justified; alerts debounced with hysteresis.
Chart type matches data story; palette colorblind-safe; non-visual fallback; loading/empty/error states.
No direct personal identifiers in the deliverable; aggregates or hashed IDs used.
